question_text: A company wants to host a static website on AWS. The website contents consist of HTML, CSS, and client-side JavaScript. Which solution is the MOST cost-effective for hosting this website?
options: Deploy a web server on an Amazon EC2 instance to host the website.
Create an Amazon S3 bucket and host the website there.
Containerize the website and host it in AWS Fargate.
Configure an Application Load Balancer with an AWS Lambda target.
explanation: Amazon S3 static website hosting is the most cost-effective solution for static websites containing HTML, CSS, client-side JS, and images, with no server maintenance.
